title: Secure named partner (public-health dept / water-justice org): need, geography, languages, endorsement
context: The Hee-Lee Oss Definition of Shipped requires that a named partner organization confirms the need in writing and endorses or adopts the project for their community's geography and languages. Without this, water-quality-explainers can be 'publicly usable' but not 'shipped' by the project's own standard. All Task JSON files currently carry verifiedNeed: false and requestor: 'TBD' because no partner is secured. This task is the gating human-decision task for M3 and the overall project Definition of Shipped.
objective: Identify, engage, and secure a named partner organization (public-health department, water-justice nonprofit, environmental-justice org, or community organization) that: (1) confirms the need in writing (letter of support or lightweight MOU); (2) identifies priority geography (region/state), priority water systems, and priority languages; (3) endorses and adopts the project for their community. On success, update verifiedNeed to true and requestor to the named org across all relevant task files.
acceptanceCriteria: A named partner organization identified and engaged
Partner confirms need in writing: a letter of support, lightweight MOU, or equivalent written commitment
Partner identifies priority geography (specific region or state), water systems, and languages
Written commitment committed to the repo (or referenced securely if confidential)
verifiedNeed is updated to true and requestor is set to the named organization across relevant task files on success
output: Document: partner engagement record including the letter of support or MOU, the partner's priority geography/systems/languages, and the task registry update (verifiedNeed: true, requestor: named org).
